title: スプリンターズSの後に・頂点賭けて！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes Bamboo Memory! She's pulling ahead
of the pack! And she's in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has crossed the finish line! She's
won! Bamboo Memory has won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Holy craaap! Did you see that final spurt?! She
left everyone in her dust!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I think she might even have a shot at beating
Oguri if they face off in a mile! What I wouldn't
give to see that!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What an astounding victory. As expected, I've
witnessed the pinnacle of sprints.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's reached the peak at this distance,
next is no doubt...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I won...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I did it... I really did it! I won the Sprinters Stakes!
I'm the best sprinter there is!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: YEEEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Omigosh, Bamboo totes ate and left no
crumbs! Seriously, she rocked! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll have to turn up the heat too! A red-hot race sounds downright fire!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it really hit home that I'm the best sprinter
today! I mean, I burned so bright out there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And now that I've conquered sprints...
choice_data_list: It's time to conquer the Mile Championship!
It's time to conquer the Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I couldn't have said it better myself!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Do you think Oguri's going to run too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, Oguri Cap is a part of Bamboo
Memory's story!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Oguri Cap announces that she'll
be racing in the Mile Championship, just like
Bamboo Memory was hoping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for Bamboo Memory herself...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! That's perfect. Thanks for the help,
Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've never helped anyone like this before, but I
hope I was of some assistance.
choice_data_list: What are you two up to?
What are you two up to?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I wrote a letter challenging Oguri! Yaeno's used
to this kind of stuff, so I asked her to look it over
for me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're not the only one who's been waiting for a
match between you and Oguri. Chiyono O,
Ardan, and I have been hoping for it as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We believe you have the power to change the
narrative that this era belongs to Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Honestly, I don't think I'll be able to pull
off anything that impressive.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's only one thing I'm bent on doing, and
that's for me and Oguri to be rivals forged by
battle and destiny!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And I refuse to lose to my rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I've got to hurry and get this to Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yup! I actually made plans to meet up with her!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Laterrr!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Straightforward to a fault as always. But that pure
heart of yours is precisely why you pursue your
dreams so earnestly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You will be at the epicenter of this new era. I truly
believe that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hi, Oguri! Sorry to keep you waiting!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's okay. I just got here. What did you nee—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Here!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A letter? You want me to give this to someone?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! It's for you! It's my challenge to you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to beat you at the Mile Championship
and become the strongest miler of our
generation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oguri! I challenge you for the title of the best
miler—as your rival!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Um, Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yes?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Why did you write this letter if you were just
going to challenge me directly like this?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Th-that's a good question!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But, it doesn't matter! This isn't about whether I
needed to write you a letter or not!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The important thing is that I want to race you in a
no-holds-barred battle for the top! This letter's
just the physical proof of that!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I understand. I'm looking forward to racing you in
the Mile Championship too, so it's nice to know
you feel the same.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I accept your challenge, Bamboo Memory. We'll
battle for the top...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's what I wanted to hear!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But you're not going to beat me! When the dust
clears, I'll be the one on top!
